result:
# Introducing Smart Drafts: A Better Way to Begin

We've all felt it — that particular kind of stuck that comes with a blinking cursor on an empty page. You know what you want to say, roughly, but shaping the first few sentences can eat up more time than the rest of the document combined. We heard this again and again from you: the hardest part of writing isn't the writing, it's the starting. Smart Drafts is our answer.

Starting today, every new document comes with a one-click option to generate an AI-suggested outline. Smart Drafts reads your document title and draws on your recent work — the projects you've been shipping, the notes you've been taking, the voice you've already established — to propose a structure you can build on. Keep what fits, rewrite what doesn't, ignore it entirely if you'd rather start fresh. It's scaffolding, not a script. The goal is simply to get you from zero to momentum in a single click, so you can spend your energy on the ideas that actually need you.

This is the first step in a larger direction we're excited about. Next up: custom voice training, so Smart Drafts doesn't just understand your topics but sounds like *you* — matching your cadence, your vocabulary, the small stylistic choices that make your writing recognizably yours. We'll have more to share on that soon. In the meantime, open a new doc, click the sparkle, and let us know what you think. Thanks, as always, for building alongside us.

We've all felt it — that particular kind of stuck that comes with a blinking cursor on an empty page. You know what you want to say, roughly, but shaping the first few sentences can eat up more time than the rest of the document combined. We heard this again and again from you: the hardest part of writing isn't the writing, it's the starting. Smart Drafts is our answer.

Starting today, every new document comes with a one-click option to generate an AI-suggested outline. Smart Drafts reads your document title and draws on your recent work — the projects you've been shipping, the notes you've been taking, the voice you've already established — to propose a structure you can build on. Keep what fits, rewrite what doesn't, ignore it entirely if you'd rather start fresh. It's scaffolding, not a script. The goal is simply to get you from zero to momentum in a single click, so you can spend your energy on the ideas that actually need you.

This is the first step in a larger direction we're excited about. Next up: custom voice training, so Smart Drafts doesn't just understand your topics but sounds like *you* — matching your cadence, your vocabulary, the small stylistic choices that make your writing recognizably yours. We'll have more to share on that soon. In the meantime, open a new doc, click the sparkle, and let us know what you think. Thanks, as always, for building alongside us.
